bypass_patterns: creative lead interpreted deployment choice as infrastructure authorization
repository-local harness created after backend absence
random identifiers substituted for native sessions
unknown token usage estimated from text length
capsule isolation asserted without an enforced filesystem boundary
fallback review result could declare pass without substantive review
rules_added: creative agents cannot create, repair, wrap, install, or configure harnesses
missing backend response cannot offer infrastructure deployment
command harness entry must be outside the repository
command entry files are hash-pinned for the backend lifetime
external calls run from a disposable working directory
repository control-plane mutations abort with control_plane_mutation
os-level isolation remains required when agents have unrestricted permissions
